calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Vicki Gross #5525
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Phuong Pham, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in foavor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Binh Than Nguyen, Ngocha T. Nguyen and Diamond Jewelry as follows:
Principal $66,000.00
Interest $57,000.00
Attorney's Fees $660.00
Costs $462.50
for a total of $124,122.50
Judgment signed in open court.
